events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The 4-gas meter shows O2 at 17.2% VOL — below the 19.5% minimum acceptable entry threshold — while LEL (1%), H2S (2 ppm), and CO (10 ppm) are all within limits. Since even one out-of-range channel fails the pre-entry test, I've recorded `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with required actions (ventilate/purge, re-test at multiple depths, and if entry can't wait, require supplied-air respiratory protection). Results written to `/app/answer.json`.
